summary: Completed iteration 7 testing of Zod validation + auth flows. All 23 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend pages (Login, ForgotPassword, ResetPassword, VerifyEmail) all working correctly. Fixed missing 'login_forgot' translation key in locale files.

minor.issue: Rate limiter (20 req/15min) triggers during heavy automated testing - expected behavior, restart backend to reset

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register with invalid email format returns 400 Zod error
POST /api/auth/register with short password (<8 chars) returns 400 Zod error
POST /api/auth/register with password without uppercase returns 400 Zod error
POST /api/auth/register with password without digit returns 400 Zod error
POST /api/auth/register with short name (<2 chars) returns 400 Zod error
POST /api/auth/register with valid data creates user and returns token + verify_url
POST /api/auth/login with invalid email format returns 400 Zod error
POST /api/auth/login with empty password returns 400 Zod error
POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns token
POST /api/auth/forgot-password with invalid email format returns 400 Zod error
POST /api/auth/forgot-password with non-existent email returns success (anti-enumeration)
POST /api/auth/forgot-password with valid email returns success + reset_url
GET /api/auth/verify-reset-token/:token with invalid token returns valid:false
GET /api/auth/verify-reset-token/:token with valid token returns valid:true
POST /api/auth/reset-password with invalid token returns 400
POST /api/auth/reset-password with weak password (no uppercase) returns 400 Zod error
POST /api/auth/reset-password with short password returns 400 Zod error
GET /api/auth/verify-email/:token with invalid token returns 400
POST /api/auth/resend-verification without auth returns 401
POST /api/auth/resend-verification with auth token works
Full password reset E2E flow: register -> forgot-password -> get token -> reset-password -> login with new password
Email verification E2E flow: register -> get verify_url -> verify email -> token marked as used
Login page shows Google button and 'Am uitat parola' link (with proper translation)
ForgotPassword page (/forgot-password) loads with email input and submit button
ResetPassword page (/reset-password?token=xxx) loads with valid token showing password form
ResetPassword page shows 'Token Invalid' message for invalid/expired tokens
VerifyEmail page (/verify-email?token=xxx) loads and shows error for invalid tokens
Dashboard loads after login with sidebar navigation working
critical_code_review_comments: Zod validation properly implemented on all auth routes using validate middleware
Password requirements enforced: min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 digit
Anti-enumeration on forgot-password: always returns success even for non-existent emails
Token model with TTL index for automatic expiration cleanup
Email verification and password reset URLs returned in API response for testing (email not configured)
Token reuse prevention: tokens marked as 'used' after successful verification/reset
seed_data_creation: Created test users during E2E tests (test_iter7_*, test_reset_*, test_verify_*) - auto-cleanup not implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 Zod validation + auth flows fully tested. All endpoints validated: register, login, forgot-password, reset-password, verify-email, resend-verification. Rate limiter may trigger during heavy testing (20 req/15min) - restart backend to reset. Email is MOCKED (console only), verify_url and reset_url returned in API response for testing. Translation key 'login_forgot' was missing and has been added to ro.js, en.js, es.js locale files.

mocked_apis.Email notifications: MOCKED - logs to console only, verify/reset URLs returned in API response
mocked_apis.Stripe payments: SIMULATED - payments created with sim_ prefix when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY not set
mocked_apis.Chat conversations: DEMO - uses hardcoded demo conversations when no real conversations exist

features_tested.zod_validation_register: PASS - all validation rules enforced (email, password strength, name length)
features_tested.zod_validation_login: PASS - email format and password required validation
features_tested.zod_validation_reset_password: PASS - token required, password strength validation
features_tested.email_verification_flow: PASS - register returns verify_url, GET /verify-email/:token works
features_tested.password_reset_flow: PASS - forgot-password returns reset_url, verify-reset-token, reset-password all work
features_tested.anti_enumeration: PASS - forgot-password returns success for non-existent emails
features_tested.token_reuse_prevention: PASS - tokens marked as used after successful operation
features_tested.frontend_forgot_password_page: PASS - loads with email input, shows reset_url after submission
features_tested.frontend_reset_password_page: PASS - shows form for valid token, error for invalid token
features_tested.frontend_verify_email_page: PASS - shows success/error based on token validity
features_tested.login_forgot_password_link: PASS - link present with proper translation
